description_long: This object is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a vibrant, modern label design. The can features a light blue background with geometric hexagonal patterns and stylized illustrations of beer mugs with frothy tops. The label includes a prominent yellow and orange banner, as well as nutritional information and pictograms on the reverse side. The top of the can is silver with a classic pull tab, and the bottom is slightly concave, typical of beverage cans. The can is shown both upright and lying on its side, revealing the full wraparound design and metallic sheen. No visible condensation or wetness is present on the exterior surface.
description: A light blue aluminum beer can with geometric patterns, beer mug illustrations, and a silver pull tab. The label is colorful and modern, with detailed graphics and text.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with a large beer mug illustration, yellow-orange banner, and hexagonal blue background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the can, displaying nutritional facts, pictograms, and the bottom of the can with a barcode and recycling symbol.
description_view_2: The side view focuses on the nutritional information and the can's wraparound label, with the can lying down to show the full side graphic.
description_view_3: This view shows the pull tab on top and the side of the can with another beer mug illustration and the colorful label.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a light blue background with hexagonal patterns, stylized beer mug illustrations, and a bold yellow-orange banner. The design uses playful, modern typography and a mix of pictograms and text for a contemporary look.
